title: CylMC+
description: A modpack for a close group of friends. Featuring magic, dungeons and everything you want from Vanilla+!
body:
### This modpack is our take on a Vanilla+ experience, blending medieval and steampunk tech into a rich, immersive world. But that’s not all—there’s something for almost everyone, with enhancements and tweaks across nearly every aspect of Minecraft.

# About the pack

- In it for adventure? Discover new weapons, dungeons, bosses, world generation, and even overhauled Nether and End dimensions packed with fresh content!

- More of a builder? We’ve got tons of new blocks to build with—and that’s just the beginning. Furniture, decorations—you name it, we’ve got it.

- Into tech? You’re in luck. The Create mod comes pre-installed, and if steampunk isn’t your thing, why not build your own 1.9 TDI with the Diesel Generators addon and make some noise?

- Aspiring chef? Thanks to various Farmer’s Delight addons, you can cook to your heart’s content!

No matter what path you take, the goal is simple: have fun!
On top of that, we’ve packed in loads of quality-of-life improvements, gameplay tweaks, and quirky extras to make the experience even better.

## Private Server

This modpack was made to strengthen the bonds within our Discord community and create memorable shared experiences. Whether you're here for adventure, creativity, or just to hang out, this pack brings us all together in our own unique ways.

Modpack is for non-commercial use only.
